items.abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种异步执行方案，以利用近存储体内存处理 (PIM) 的存储体级并行性。我们观察到，执行内存操作没有充分利用 PIM 计算的并行性，因为近库 PIM 被指定为同步操作所有库。当其中一个存储体执行基本存储器命令（例如读/写请求和激活/预充电操作）时，全存储体计算可能会被延迟。我们的目标是减轻吞吐量下降，特别关注激活/预充电操作引起的执行延迟。对于访问所有存储体的同一行的所有存储体执行，不可避免地会发生大量的激活/预充电操作。考虑到限制行打开操作 (tFAW) 速率的计时参数，吞吐量可能会进一步下降。为了解决这种激活/预充电开销，我们提出了 AESPA，这是一种异步操作存储体的新并行执行方案。 AESPA 与之前的同步执行的不同之处在于（1）AESPA 的计算命令针对单个存储体，以及（2）每个处理单元计算存储在多个 DRAM 列中的数据。通过这样做，当一个存储体计算多个 DRAM 列时，内存控制器向其他存储体发出激活/预充电或 PIM 计算命令。因此，AESPA 隐藏了 PIM 计算的激活延迟，并充分利用银行的聚合带宽。为此，我们修改了硬件和软件以支持先前近岸 PIM 架构的向量和矩阵计算。特别是，我们更改了基于内积的矩阵向量乘法，以使其适合 AESPA PIM。以前的矩阵向量乘法需要跨所有处理单元进行数据广播和同时计算。通过改变矩阵向量相乘方法，AESPA PIM可以将数据传输到各个处理单元并异步开始计算。因此，与两种不同的最先进 PIM 相比，采用 AESPA 的近银行 PIM 实现了 33.5% 和 59.5% 的加速。

items.title: Utopia: Fast and Efficient Address Translation via Hybrid Restrictive & Flexible Virtual-to-Physical Address Mappings.
items.abstract:
Conventional virtual memory (VM) frameworks enable a virtual address to flexibly map to any physical address. This flexibility necessitates large data structures to store virtual-to-physical mappings, which leads to high address translation latency and large translation-induced interference in the memory hierarchy, especially in data-intensive workloads. On the other hand, restricting the address mapping so that a virtual address can only map to a specific set of physical addresses can significantly reduce address translation overheads by making use of compact and efficient translation structures. However, restricting the address mapping flexibility across the entire main memory severely limits data sharing across different processes and increases data accesses to the swap space of the storage device even in the presence of free memory.

We propose Utopia, a new hybrid virtual-to-physical address mapping scheme that allows both flexible and restrictive hash-based address mapping schemes to harmoniously co-exist in the system. The key idea of Utopia is to manage physical memory using two types of physical memory segments: restrictive segments and flexible segments. A restrictive segment uses a restrictive, hash-based address mapping scheme that maps virtual addresses to only a specific set of physical addresses and enables faster address translation using compact translation structures. A flexible segment employs the conventional fully-flexible address mapping scheme. By mapping data to a restrictive segment, Utopia enables faster address translation with lower translation-induced interference. At the same time, Utopia retains the ability to use the flexible address mapping to (i) support conventional VM features such as data sharing and (ii) avoid storing data in the swap space of the storage device when program data does not fit inside a restrictive segment.

Our evaluation using 11 diverse data-intensive workloads shows that Utopia improves performance by 24% in a single-core system over the baseline conventional four-level radix-tree page table design, whereas the best prior state-of-the-art contiguity-aware translation scheme improves performance by 13%. Utopia provides 95% of the performance benefits of an ideal address translation scheme where every translation request hits in the first-level TLB. All of Utopia’s benefits come at a modest cost of 0.64% area overhead and 0.72% power overhead compared to a modern high-end CPU. The source code of Utopia is freely available at https://github.com/CMU-SAFARI/Utopia.
items.abstract_zh:
传统的虚拟内存（VM）框架使虚拟地址能够灵活地映射到任何物理地址。这种灵活性需要大型数据结构来存储虚拟到物理的映射，这会导致内存层次结构中的高地址转换延迟和大量转换引起的干扰，尤其是在数据密集型工作负载中。另一方面，限制地址映射使得虚拟地址只能映射到特定的物理地址集可以通过利用紧凑且高效的转换结构来显着减少地址转换开销。然而，限制整个主存储器上的地址映射灵活性严重限制了不同进程之间的数据共享，并且即使在存在空闲存储器的情况下也会增加对存储设备交换空间的数据访问。

我们提出了 Utopia，一种新的混合虚拟到物理地址映射方案，它允许灵活的和限制性的基于哈希的地址映射方案在系统中和谐共存。 Utopia 的关键思想是使用两种类型的物理内存段来管理物理内存：限制性段和灵活段。限制性段使用限制性的、基于散列的地址映射方案，该方案将虚拟地址仅映射到一组特定的物理地址，并使用紧凑的转换结构实现更快的地址转换。灵活段采用传统的完全灵活地址映射方案。通过将数据映射到限制性段，Utopia 可以实现更快的地址转换，并降低转换引起的干扰。同时，Utopia 保留了使用灵活地址映射的能力，以 (i) 支持传统的 VM 功能，例如数据共享，以及 (ii) 当程序数据不适合限制性段时，避免将数据存储在存储设备的交换空间中。

我们使用 11 个不同的数据密集型工作负载进行的评估表明，与基线传统四级基数树页表设计相比，Utopia 在单核系统中将性能提高了 24%，而最先进的邻接感知转换方案将性能提高了 13%。 Utopia 提供理想地址转换方案 95% 的性能优势，其中每个转换请求都会到达第一级 TLB。与现代高端 CPU 相比，Utopia 的所有优势都以适度的成本实现，即 0.64% 的面积开销和 0.72% 的功耗开销。 Utopia 的源代码可在 https://github.com/CMU-SAFARI/Utopia 免费获取。

items.title: Victima: Drastically Increasing Address Translation Reach by Leveraging Underutilized Cache Resources.
items.abstract:
Address translation is a performance bottleneck in data-intensive workloads due to large datasets and irregular access patterns that lead to frequent high-latency page table walks (PTWs). PTWs can be reduced by using (i) large hardware TLBs or (ii) large software-managed TLBs. Unfortunately, both solutions have significant drawbacks: increased access latency, power and area (for hardware TLBs), and costly memory accesses, the need for large contiguous memory blocks, and complex OS modifications (for software-managed TLBs).

We present Victima, a new software-transparent mechanism that drastically increases the translation reach of the processor by leveraging the underutilized resources of the cache hierarchy. The key idea of Victima is to repurpose L2 cache blocks to store clusters of TLB entries, thereby providing an additional low-latency and high-capacity component that backs up the last-level TLB and thus reduces PTWs. Victima has two main components. First, a PTW cost predictor (PTW-CP) identifies costly-to-translate addresses based on the frequency and cost of the PTWs they lead to. Leveraging the PTW-CP, Victima uses the valuable cache space only for TLB entries that correspond to costly-to-translate pages, reducing the impact on cached application data. Second, a TLB-aware cache replacement policy prioritizes keeping TLB entries in the cache hierarchy by considering (i) the translation pressure (e.g., last-level TLB miss rate) and (ii) the reuse characteristics of the TLB entries.

Our evaluation results show that in native (virtualized) execution environments Victima improves average end-to-end application performance by 7.4% (28.7%) over the baseline four-level radix-tree-based page table design and by 6.2% (20.1%) over a state-of-the-art software-managed TLB, across 11 diverse data-intensive workloads. Victima delivers similar performance as a system that employs an optimistic 128K-entry L2 TLB, while avoiding the associated area and power overheads. Victima (i) is effective in both native and virtualized environments, (ii) is completely transparent to application and system software, (iii) unlike large software-managed TLBs, does not require contiguous physical allocations, (iv) is compatible with modern large page mechanisms and (iv) incurs very small area and power overheads of and, respectively, on a modern high-end CPU. The source code of Victima is freely available at https://github.com/CMU-SAFARI/Victima.
items.abstract_zh:
由于大型数据集和不规则的访问模式导致频繁的高延迟页表遍历 (PTW)，地址转换是数据密集型工作负载中的性能瓶颈。可以通过使用 (i) 大型硬件 TLB 或 (ii) 大型软件管理的 TLB 来减少 PTW。不幸的是，这两种解决方案都有显着的缺点：增加访问延迟、功耗和面积（对于硬件 TLB）、昂贵的内存访问、需要大型连续内存块以及复杂的操作系统修改（对于软件管理的 TLB）。

我们推出了 Victima，一种新的软件透明机制，它通过利用缓存层次结构中未充分利用的资源，极大地增加了处理器的转换范围。 Victima 的关键思想是重新利用 L2 缓存块来存储 TLB 条目簇，从而提供额外的低延迟和高容量组件来备份最后一级 TLB，从而减少 PTW。 Victima 有两个主要组成部分。首先，PTW 成本预测器 (PTW-CP) 根据地址所导致的 PTW 的频率和成本来识别翻译成本较高的地址。利用 PTW-CP，Victima 仅将宝贵的缓存空间用于与翻译成本较高的页面相对应的 TLB 条目，从而减少对缓存应用程序数据的影响。其次，TLB 感知缓存替换策略通过考虑 (i) 转换压力（例如，最后一级 TLB 缺失率）和 (ii) TLB 条目的重用特性，优先考虑将 TLB 条目保留在缓存层次结构中。

我们的评估结果表明，在本机（虚拟化）执行环境中，Victima 在 11 个不同的数据密集型工作负载中，与基于四级基数树的基准页表设计相比，平均端到端应用程序性能提高了 7.4% (28.7%)，比最先进的软件管理 TLB 提高了 6.2% (20.1%)。 Victima 提供与采用乐观 128K 条目 L2 TLB 的系统类似的性能，同时避免相关的面积和功率开销。 Victima (i) 在本机和虚拟化环境中均有效，(ii) 对应用程序和系统软件完全透明，(iii) 与大型软件管理的 TLB 不同，不需要连续的物理分配，(iv) 与现代大页面机制兼容，(iv) 在现代高端 CPU 上分别产生非常小的面积和功率开销。 Victima 的源代码可在 https://github.com/CMU-SAFARI/Victima 免费获取。

items.title: HARP: Hardware-Based Pseudo-Tiling for Sparse Matrix Multiplication Accelerator.
items.abstract:
General sparse matrix-matrix multiplication (SpGEMM) is a memory-bound workload, due to the compression format used. To minimize data movements for input matrices, outer product accelerators have been proposed. Since these accelerators access input matrices only once and then generate numerous partial products, managing the generated partial products is the key optimization factor. To reduce the number of partial products handled, the state-of-the-art accelerator uses software to tile an input matrix. However, the software-based tiling has three limitations. First, a user manually executes the tiling software and manages the tiles. Second, generating a compression format for each tile incurs memory-intensive operations. Third, an accelerator that uses the compression format cannot skip ineffectual accesses for input matrices.

To overcome these limitations, this paper proposes hardware-based pseudo-tiling (HARP), which enables logical tiling of the original compressed matrix without generating a compression format for each tile. To this end, HARP utilizes our proposed Runtime Operand Descriptor to point to an effectual column-row pair in a pseudo-tile. Consequently, HARP enables a user to use the accelerator as a normal SpGEMM operation does without tiling. Furthermore, HARP does not require a compression format for each tile and can skip ineffectual accesses for input matrices. To further improve the efficiency of pseudo-tiling, HARP performs super-tiling to combine pseudo-tiles and sub-tiling to further tile a pseudo-tile. Experiment results show that HARP achieves 4 ×, 35 ×, and 33 × speedup and 5 ×, 664 ×, and 233 × energy efficiency on average compared to the state-of-the-art outer product accelerator, CPU (MKL), and GPU (cuSPARSE), respectively.
items.abstract_zh:
由于使用的压缩格式，一般稀疏矩阵-矩阵乘法 (SpGEMM) 是内存密集型工作负载。为了最小化输入矩阵的数据移动，已经提出了外积加速器。由于这些加速器仅访问输入矩阵一次，然后生成大量部分产品，因此管理生成的部分产品是关键的优化因素。为了减少处理的部分乘积的数量，最先进的加速器使用软件来平铺输入矩阵。然而，基于软件的平铺具有三个限制。首先，用户手动执行平铺软件并管理平铺。其次，为每个图块生成压缩格式会导致内存密集型操作。第三，使用压缩格式的加速器无法跳过对输入矩阵的无效访问。

为了克服这些限制，本文提出了基于硬件的伪平铺（HARP），它可以对原始压缩矩阵进行逻辑平铺，而无需为每个平铺生成压缩格式。为此，HARP 利用我们提出的运行时操作数描述符来指向伪图块中的有效列行对。因此，HARP 使用户能够像正常 SpGEMM 操作一样使用加速器，而无需平铺。此外，HARP 不需要每个图块的压缩格式，并且可以跳过对输入矩阵的无效访问。为了进一步提高伪切片的效率，HARP执行超级切片以组合伪切片和子切片以进一步切片伪切片。实验结果表明，与最先进的外积加速器 CPU (MKL) 和 GPU (cuSPARSE) 相比，HARP 分别实现了 4 ×、35 × 和 33 × 的加速比以及 5 ×、664 × 和 233 × 的能效。

items.title: Improving Data Reuse in NPU On-chip Memory with Interleaved Gradient Order for DNN Training.
items.abstract: During training tasks for machine learning models with neural processing units (NPUs), the most time-consuming part is the backward pass, which incurs significant overheads due to off-chip memory accesses. For NPUs, to mitigate the long latency and limited bandwidth of such off-chip DRAM accesses, the software-managed on-chip scratchpad memory (SPM) plays a crucial role. As the backward pass computation must be optimized to improve the effectiveness of SPM, this study identifies a new data reuse pattern specific to the backward computation. The backward pass includes independent input and weight gradient computations sharing the same output gradient in each layer. Conventional sequential processing does not exploit the potential inter-operation data reuse opportunity within SPM. With this new opportunity of data reuse in the backward pass, this study proposes a novel data flow transformation scheme called interleaved gradient order, consisting of three techniques to enhance the utilization of NPU scratchpad memory. The first technique shuffles the input and weight gradient computations by interleaving two operations into a single fused operation to reduce redundant output gradient accesses. The second technique adjusts the tile access order for the interleaved gradient computations to maximize the potential data locality. However, since the best order is not fixed for all tensors, we propose a selection algorithm to find the most suitable order based on the tensor dimensions. The final technique further improves data reuse chances by using the best partitioning and mapping scheme for two gradient computations for single-core and multi-core NPUs. The simulation-based evaluation with single-core edge and server NPUs shows that the combined techniques can improve performance by 29.3% and 14.5% for edge and server NPUs respectively. Furthermore, with a quad-core server NPU, the proposed techniques reduce the execution time by 23.7%.
items.abstract_zh: 在使用神经处理单元 (NPU) 的机器学习模型的训练任务中，最耗时的部分是后向传递，这会因片外内存访问而产生大量开销。对于 NPU 而言，为了缓解此类片外 DRAM 访问的长延迟和有限带宽，软件管理的片上暂存存储器 (SPM) 发挥着至关重要的作用。由于必须优化后向传递计算以提高 SPM 的有效性，因此本研究确定了一种特定于后向计算的新数据重用模式。后向传递包括独立的输入和权重梯度计算，在每层中共享相同的输出梯度。传统的顺序处理没有​​利用 SPM 内潜在的互操作数据重用机会。利用后向传递中数据重用的这一新机会，本研究提出了一种称为交错梯度顺序的新型数据流转换方案，该方案由三种技术组成，以提高 NPU 暂存器存储器的利用率。第一种技术通过将两个操作交织成单个融合操作来重新排列输入和权重梯度计算，以减少冗余输出梯度访问。第二种技术调整交错梯度计算的图块访问顺序，以最大化潜在的数据局部性。然而，由于所有张量的最佳顺序并不是固定的，因此我们提出了一种选择算法来根据张量维度找到最合适的顺序。最终技术通过对单核和多核 NPU 的两次梯度计算使用最佳分区和映射方案，进一步提高了数据重用机会。基于单核边缘和服务器 NPU 的仿真评估表明，组合技术可以将边缘和服务器 NPU 的性能分别提高 29.3% 和 14.5%。此外，使用四核服务器 NPU，所提出的技术将执行时间减少了 23.7%。

items.title: How to Kill the Second Bird with One ECC: The Pursuit of Row Hammer Resilient DRAM.
items.abstract:
Error-correcting code (ECC) has been widely used in DRAM-based memory systems to address the exacerbating random errors following the fabrication process scaling. However, ECCs including the strong form of Chipkill have not been so effective against Row Hammer (RH), which incurs bursts of errors discretely corrupting the whole row beyond the ECC correction capability.

We propose Cube, a novel chip-wise physical to DRAM address randomization scheme that leverages the abundant detection capability of on-die-ECC (OECC) and correction capability of Chipkill against RH. Cube allows for synergistic cooperation between ECC, probabilistic RH-protection schemes, and the system with minimal to no modification for each. First, Cube scrambles the rows of each chip using a boot-time key in a way that distributes RH victims to multiple Chipkill codewords. Second, Cube utilizes the newly observed distinct RH error characteristics from real DRAM chips, to swiftly diagnose the RH victim rows using the error profile from OECC scrubbing, and even correct it leveraging Chipkill. When combined, Cube decreases the failure probability of PARA and a state-of-the-art RH protection scheme SRS by up to 10− 25. At a target failure probability of 10− 10 per year on a DDR5 rank under the RH threshold of 2K, Cube reduces the performance and table size overhead of SRS by up to 24.3% and 39.9%, respectively.
items.abstract_zh:
纠错码 (ECC) 已广泛应用于基于 DRAM 的存储系统中，以解决制造工艺缩放后加剧的随机错误。然而，包括强形式 Chipkill 在内的 ECC 对抗 Row Hammer (RH) 的效果并不那么有效，它会引发突发错误，离散地破坏整个行，超出了 ECC 纠正能力。

我们提出了 Cube，一种新颖的芯片级物理到 DRAM 地址随机化方案，该方案利用了片上 ECC (OECC) 的丰富检测能力和 Chipkill 针对 RH 的校正能力。 Cube 允许 ECC、概率 RH 保护方案和系统之间的协同合作，并且对每个方案进行最小程度的修改甚至无需修改。首先，Cube 使用启动时密钥对每个芯片的行进行置乱，将 RH 受害者分配给多个 Chipkill 代码字。其次，Cube 利用从真实 DRAM 芯片中新观察到的独特 RH 错误特征，使用 OECC 清理的错误配置文件快速诊断 RH 受害行，甚至利用 Chipkill 进行纠正。结合使用时，Cube 可将 PARA 和最先进的 RH 保护方案 SRS 的故障概率降低多达 10−25。在 2K RH 阈值下的 DDR5 列上，以每年 10−10 次的目标故障概率，Cube 将 SRS 的性能和表大小开销分别降低多达 24.3% 和 39.9%。

items.title: AuRORA: Virtualized Accelerator Orchestration for Multi-Tenant Workloads.
items.abstract:
With the widespread adoption of deep neural networks (DNNs) across applications, there is a growing demand for DNN deployment solutions that can seamlessly support multi-tenant execution. This involves simultaneously running multiple DNN workloads on heterogeneous architectures with domain-specific accelerators. However, existing accelerator interfaces directly bind the accelerator’s physical resources to user threads, without an efficient mechanism to adaptively re-partition available resources. This leads to high programming complexities and performance overheads due to sub-optimal resource allocation, making scalable many-accelerator deployment impractical.

To address this challenge, we propose AuRORA, a novel accelerator integration methodology that enables scalable accelerator deployment for multi-tenant workloads. In particular, AuRORA supports virtualized accelerator orchestration via co-designing the hardware-software stack of accelerators to allow adaptively binding current workloads onto available accelerators. We demonstrate that AuRORA achieves 2.02 higher overall SLA satisfaction, 1.33 overall system throughput, and 1.34 overall fairness compared to existing accelerator integration solutions with less than 2.7% area overhead.
items.abstract_zh:
随着深度神经网络 (DNN) 在各个应用程序中的广泛采用，对能够无缝支持多租户执行的 DNN 部署解决方案的需求不断增长。 This involves simultaneously running multiple DNN workloads on heterogeneous architectures with domain-specific accelerators.然而，现有的加速器接口直接将加速器的物理资源绑定到用户线程，没有有效的机制来自适应地重新分配可用资源。由于资源分配不理想，这会导致较高的编程复杂性和性能开销，从而使得可扩展的多加速器部署变得不切实际。

为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了 AuRORA，这是一种新颖的加速器集成方法，可为多租户工作负载提供可扩展的加速器部署。特别是，AuRORA 通过共同设计加速器的硬件软件堆栈来支持虚拟化加速器编排，以允许将当前工作负载自适应地绑定到可用加速器上。我们证明，与现有加速器集成解决方案相比，AuRORA 的总体 SLA 满意度提高了 2.02，总体系统吞吐量提高了 1.33，总体公平性提高了 1.34，面积开销不到 2.7%。

items.title: McCore: A Holistic Management of High-Performance Heterogeneous Multicores.
items.abstract:
Heterogeneous multicore systems have emerged as a promising approach to scale performance in high-end desktops within limited power and die size constraints. Despite their advantages, these systems face three major challenges: memory bandwidth limitation, shared cache contention, and heterogeneity. Small cores in these systems tend to occupy a significant portion of shared LLC and memory bandwidth, despite their lower computational capabilities, leading to performance degradation of up to 18% in memory-intensive workloads. Therefore, it is crucial to address these challenges holistically, considering shared resources and core heterogeneity while managing shared cache and bandwidth.

To tackle these issues, we propose McCore, a comprehensive solution that reorganizes the heterogeneous multicore memory hierarchy and effectively leverages this structure through a hardware-based reinforcement learning (RL) scheduler. The McCore structure aims to enhance performance by partitioning the shared LLC based on each cluster’s asymmetric computing power and conditionally enabling fine-grained access in small cores. The McCore RL agent holistically controls these structures, incorporating a hardware-based online RL scheduler that accounts for bandwidth utilization and caching effectiveness to consider the heterogeneity in McCore structures. By implementing the RL agent module as hardware that cooperates with existing hardware monitors and performance counters, low-latency scheduling is enabled without burdening the OS kernel. McCore achieves a 25.1% performance gain compared to the baseline and significantly outperforms existing state-of-the-art cache partitioning, sparse access managing schemes, and heterogeneous multicore schedulers, providing a comprehensive solution for high-performance heterogeneous multicore systems.
items.abstract_zh:
异构多核系统已成为在有限的功率和芯片尺寸限制下扩展高端桌面性能的一种有前途的方法。尽管有这些优点，这些系统仍面临三大挑战：内存带宽限制、共享缓存争用和异构性。这些系统中的小内核往往会占用共享 LLC 和内存带宽的很大一部分，尽管它们的计算能力较低，导致内存密集型工作负载的性能下降高达 18%。因此，从整体上解决这些挑战至关重要，在管理共享缓存和带宽的同时考虑共享资源和核心异构性。

为了解决这些问题，我们提出了 McCore，这是一种全面的解决方案，可以重新组织异构多核内存层次结构，并通过基于硬件的强化学习 (RL) 调度程序有效地利用这种结构。 McCore结构旨在通过根据每个集群的不对称计算能力对共享LLC进行分区，并有条件地在小核中启用细粒度访问来提高性能。 McCore RL 代理全面控制这些结构，结合基于硬件的在线 RL 调度程序，该调度程序考虑带宽利用率和缓存有效性，以考虑 McCore 结构中的异构性。通过将强化学习代理模块实现为与现有硬件监视器和性能计数器配合的硬件，可以在不增加操作系统内核负担的情况下实现低延迟调度。与基准相比，McCore 实现了 25.1% 的性能提升，显着优于现有最先进的缓存分区、稀疏访问管理方案和异构多核调度器，为高性能异构多核系统提供了全面的解决方案。

items.title: Exploiting Inherent Properties of Complex Numbers for Accelerating Complex Valued Neural Networks.
items.abstract: Since conventional Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) use real numbers as their data, they are unable to capture the imaginary values and the correlations between real and imaginary values in applications that use complex numbers. To address this limitation, Complex Valued Neural Networks (CVNNs) have been introduced, enabling to capture the context of complex numbers for various applications such as Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI), radar, and sensing. CVNNs handle their data with complex numbers and adopt complex number arithmetic to their layer operations, so they exhibit distinct design challenges with real-valued DNNs. The first challenge is the data representation of the complex number, which requires two values for a single data, doubling the total data size of the networks. Moreover, due to the unique operations of the complex-valued layers, CVNNs require a specialized scheduling policy to fully utilize the hardware resources and achieve optimal performance. To mitigate the design challenges, we propose software and hardware co-design techniques that effectively resolves the memory and compute overhead of CVNNs. First, we propose Polar Form Aware Quantization (PAQ) that utilizes the characteristics of the complex number and their unique value distribution on CVNNs. Then, we propose our hardware accelerator that supports PAQ and CVNN operations. Lastly, we design a CVNN-aware scheduling scheme that optimizes the performance and resource utilization of an accelerator by aiming at the special layer operations of CVNN. PAQ achieves 62.5% data compression over CVNNs using FP16 while retaining a similar error with INT8 quantization, and our hardware support PAQ with only 2% area overhead over conventional systolic array architecture. In our evaluation, PAQ hardware with the scheduling scheme achieves a 32% lower latency and 30% lower energy consumption than other accelerators.
items.abstract_zh: 由于传统的深度神经网络（DNN）使用实数作为数据，因此它们无法捕获使用复数的应用程序中的虚值以及实数和虚数之间的相关性。为了解决这一限制，引入了复值神经网络 (CVNN)，能够捕获磁共振成像 (MRI)、雷达和传感等各种应用的复数背景。 CVNN 使用复数处理数据，并在层运算中采用复数算术，因此它们在实值 DNN 方面面临着独特的设计挑战。第一个挑战是复数的数据表示，这需要单个数据两个值，从而使网络的总数据大小加倍。此外，由于复值层的独特操作，CVNN需要专门的调度策略来充分利用硬件资源并实现最佳性能。为了缓解设计挑战，我们提出了软件和硬件协同设计技术，可以有效解决 CVNN 的内存和计算开销。首先，我们提出了极坐标形式感知量化（PAQ），它利用复数的特征及其在 CVNN 上的独特值分布。然后，我们提出支持 PAQ 和 CVNN 操作的硬件加速器。最后，我们设计了一种CVNN感知调度方案，通过针对CVNN的特殊层操作来优化加速器的性能和资源利用率。 PAQ 比使用 FP16 的 CVNN 实现了 62.5% 的数据压缩，同时保留了与 INT8 量化类似的误差，并且我们的硬件支持 PAQ，仅比传统脉动阵列架构减少 2% 的面积开销。在我们的评估中，采用该调度方案的 PAQ 硬件比其他加速器实现了 32% 的延迟降低和 30% 的能耗降低。

items.title: SecureLoop: Design Space Exploration of Secure DNN Accelerators.
items.abstract:
Deep neural networks (DNNs) are gaining popularity in a wide range of domains, ranging from speech and video recognition to healthcare. With this increased adoption comes the pressing need for securing DNN execution environments on CPUs, GPUs, and ASICs. While there are active research efforts in supporting a trusted execution environment (TEE) on CPUs, the exploration in supporting TEEs on accelerators is limited, with only a few solutions available [18, 19, 27]. A key limitation along this line of work is that these secure DNN accelerators narrowly consider a few specific architectures. The design choices and the associated cost for securing these architectures do not transfer to other diverse architectures.

This paper strives to address this limitation by developing a design space exploration tool for supporting TEEs on diverse DNN accelerators. We target secure DNN accelerators equipped with cryptographic engines where the cryptographic operations are closely coupled with the data movement in the accelerators. These operations significantly complicate the scheduling for DNN accelerators, as the scheduling needs to account for the extra on-chip computation and off-chip memory accesses introduced by these cryptographic operations, and even needs to account for potential interactions across DNN layers.

We tackle these challenges in our tool, called SecureLoop, by introducing a scheduling search engine with the following attributes: 1) considers the cryptographic overhead associated with every off-chip data access, 2) uses an efficient modular arithmetic technique to compute the optimal authentication block assignment for each individual layer, and 3) uses a simulated annealing algorithm to perform cross-layer optimizations. Compared to the conventional schedulers, our tool finds the schedule for secure DNN designs with up to 33.2% speedup and 50.2% improvement of energy-delay-product.
items.abstract_zh:
深度神经网络 (DNN) 在从语音和视频识别到医疗保健等广泛领域中越来越受欢迎。随着采用率的提高，迫切需要保护 CPU、GPU 和 ASIC 上的 DNN 执行环境。尽管在支持 CPU 上的可信执行环境 (TEE) 方面开展了积极的研究工作，但在加速器上支持 TEE 的探索有限，只有少数可用的解决方案 [18,19,27]。这一工作的一个关键限制是这些安全 DNN 加速器狭隘地考虑了一些特定的架构。保护这些架构的设计选择和相关成本不会转移到其他不同的架构。

本文致力于通过开发一种设计空间探索工具来支持不同 DNN 加速器上的 TEE，从而解决这一限制。我们的目标是配备加密引擎的安全 DNN 加速器，其中加密操作与加速器中的数据移动紧密结合。这些操作使 DNN 加速器的调度显着复杂化，因为调度需要考虑这些加密操作引入的额外片内计算和片外内存访问，甚至需要考虑跨 DNN 层的潜在交互。

我们在名为 SecureLoop 的工具中通过引入具有以下属性的调度搜索引擎来解决这些挑战：1）考虑与每个片外数据访问相关的加密开销，2）使用高效的模块化算术技术来计算每个单独层的最佳身份验证块分配，以及 3）使用模拟退火算法来执行跨层优化。与传统的调度器相比，我们的工具找到了安全 DNN 设计的调度，加速率高达 33.2%，能量延迟乘积提高了 50.2%。

items.title: Path Forward Beyond Simulators: Fast and Accurate GPU Execution Time Prediction for DNN Workloads.
items.abstract:
Today, DNNs’ high computational complexity and sub-optimal device utilization present a major roadblock to democratizing DNNs. To reduce the execution time and improve device utilization, researchers have been proposing new system design solutions, which require performance models (especially GPU models) to help them with pre-product concept validation. Currently, researchers have been utilizing simulators to predict execution time, which provides high flexibility and acceptable accuracy, but at the cost of a long simulation time. Simulators are becoming increasingly impractical to model today’s large-scale systems and DNNs, urging us to find alternative lightweight solutions.

To solve this problem, we propose using a data-driven method for modeling DNNs system performance. We first build a dataset that includes the execution time of numerous networks/layers/kernels. After identifying the relationships of directly known information (e.g., network structure, hardware theoretical computing capabilities), we discuss how to build a simple, yet accurate, performance model for DNNs execution time. Our observations on the dataset demonstrate prevalent linear relationships between the GPU kernel execution times, operation counts, and input/output parameters of DNNs layers. Guided by our observations, we develop a fast, linear-regression-based DNNs execution time predictor. Our evaluation using various image classification models suggests our method can predict new DNNs performance with a 7% error and new GPU performance with a 15.2% error. Our case studies also demonstrate how the performance model can facilitate future DNNs system research.
items.abstract_zh:
如今，DNN 的高计算复杂性和次优设备利用率是 DNN 民主化的主要障碍。为了减少执行时间并提高设备利用率，研究人员一直在提出新的系统设计解决方案，这需要性能模型（尤其是 GPU 模型）来帮助他们进行产品前概念验证。目前，研究人员一直在利用模拟器来预测执行时间，这提供了很高的灵活性和可接受的精度，但代价是模拟时间较长。模拟器对于当今的大型系统和 DNN 建模变得越来越不切实际，这促使我们寻找替代的轻量级解决方案。

为了解决这个问题，我们建议使用数据驱动的方法来建模 DNN 系统性能。我们首先构建一个数据集，其中包括众多网络/层/内核的执行时间。在确定直接已知信息（例如网络结构、硬件理论计算能力）的关系后，我们讨论如何为 DNN 执行时间构建一个简单但准确的性能模型。我们对数据集的观察表明 GPU 内核执行时间、操作计数和 DNN 层的输入/输出参数之间存在普遍的线性关系。根据我们的观察，我们开发了一种快速、基于线性回归的 DNN 执行时间预测器。我们使用各种图像分类模型进行的评估表明，我们的方法可以预测新的 DNN 性能，误差为 7%，预测新的 GPU 性能，误差为 15.2%。我们的案例研究还展示了性能模型如何促进未来的 DNN 系统研究。

items.title: IDYLL: Enhancing Page Translation in Multi-GPUs via Light Weight PTE Invalidations.
items.abstract: Multi-GPU systems have emerged as a desirable platform to deliver high computing capabilities and large memory capacity to accommodate large dataset sizes. However, naively employing multi-GPU incurs non-scalable performance. One major reason is that execution efficiency suffers expensive address translations in multi-GPU systems. The data-sharing nature of GPU applications requires page migration between GPUs to mitigate non-uniform memory access overheads. Unfortunately, frequent page migration incurs substantial page table invalidation overheads to ensure translation coherence. A comprehensive investigation of multi-GPU address translation efficiency identifies two significant bottlenecks caused by page table invalidation requests: (i) increased latency for demand TLB miss requests and (ii) increased waiting latency for performing page migrations. Based on observations, we propose IDYLL, which reduces the number of page table invalidations by maintaining an “in-PTE" directory and reduces invalidation latency by batching multiple invalidation requests to exploit spatial locality. We show that IDYLL improves overall performance by 69.9% on average.
items.abstract_zh: 多 GPU 系统已成为提供高计算能力和大内存容量以适应大型数据集大小的理想平台。然而，天真地使用多 GPU 会导致性能不可扩展。一个主要原因是多 GPU 系统中的执行效率受到昂贵的地址转换的影响。 GPU 应用程序的数据共享性质需要 GPU 之间的页面迁移，以减轻非均匀内存访问开销。不幸的是，频繁的页面迁移会产生大量的页表失效开销，以确保转换的一致性。对多 GPU 地址转换效率的全面调查发现了由页表失效请求引起的两个重要瓶颈：(i) 需求 TLB 未命中请求的延迟增加，以及 (ii) 执行页面迁移的等待延迟增加。根据观察，我们提出了 IDYLL，它通过维护“in-PTE”目录来减少页表失效的数量，并通过批处理多个失效请求以利用空间局部性来减少失效延迟。我们发现 IDYLL 平均将整体性能提高了 69.9%。

items.title: Learning to Drive Software-Defined Solid-State Drives.
items.abstract:
Thanks to the mature manufacturing techniques, flash-based solid-state drives (SSDs) are highly customizable for applications today, which brings opportunities to further improve their storage performance and resource utilization. However, the SSD efficiency is usually determined by many hardware parameters, making it hard for developers to manually tune them and determine the optimized SSD hardware configurations.

In this paper, we present an automated learning-based SSD hardware configuration framework, named AutoBlox, that utilizes both supervised and unsupervised machine learning (ML) techniques to drive the tuning of hardware configurations for SSDs. AutoBlox automatically extracts the unique access patterns of a new workload using its block I/O traces, maps the workload to previous workloads for utilizing the learned experiences, and recommends an optimized SSD configuration based on the validated storage performance. AutoBlox accelerates the development of new SSD devices by automating the hardware parameter configurations and reducing the manual efforts. We develop AutoBlox with simple yet effective learning algorithms that can run efficiently on multi-core CPUs. Given a target storage workload, our evaluation shows that AutoBlox can deliver an optimized SSD configuration that can improve the performance of the target workload by 1.30 × on average, compared to commodity SSDs, while satisfying specified constraints such as SSD capacity, device interfaces, and power budget. And this configuration will maximize the performance improvement for both target workloads and non-target workloads.
items.abstract_zh:
得益于成熟的制造技术，基于闪存的固态硬盘（SSD）可以针对当今的应用进行高度定制，这为进一步提高其存储性能和资源利用率带来了机会。然而，SSD效率通常由许多硬件参数决定，开发人员很难手动调整它们并确定优化的SSD硬件配置。

在本文中，我们提出了一种基于自动化学习的 SSD 硬件配置框架，名为 AutoBlox，它利用监督和无监督机器学习 (ML) 技术来驱动 SSD 硬件配置的调整。 AutoBlox 使用其块 I/O 跟踪自动提取新工作负载的独特访问模式，将工作负载映射到以前的工作负载以利用学到的经验，并根据经过验证的存储性能推荐优化的 SSD 配置。 AutoBlox 通过自动化硬件参数配置并减少手动工作来加速新 SSD 设备的开发。我们使用简单而有效的学习算法开发 AutoBlox，可以在多核 CPU 上高效运行。给定目标存储工作负载，我们的评估表明，AutoBlox 可以提供优化的 SSD 配置，与商用 SSD 相比，可以将目标工作负载的性能平均提高 1.30 倍，同时满足 SSD 容量、设备接口和功率预算等指定约束。此配置将最大限度地提高目标工作负载和非目标工作负载的性能。

items.title: ReFOCUS: Reusing Light for Efficient Fourier Optics-Based Photonic Neural Network Accelerator.
items.abstract:
In recent years, there has been a significant focus on achieving low-latency and high-throughput convolutional neural network (CNN) inference. Integrated photonics offers the potential to substantially expedite neural networks due to its inherent low-latency properties. Recently, on-chip Fourier optics-based neural network accelerators have been demonstrated and achieved superior energy efficiency for CNN acceleration. By incorporating Fourier optics, computationally intensive convolution operations can be performed instantaneously through on-chip lenses at a significantly lower cost compared to other on-chip photonic neural network accelerators. This is thanks to the complexity reduction offered by the convolution theorem and the passive Fourier transforms computed by on-chip lenses. However, conversion overhead between optical and digital domains and memory access energy still hinder overall efficiency.

We introduce ReFOCUS, a Joint Transform Correlator (JTC) based on-chip neural network accelerator that efficiently reuses light through optical buffers. By incorporating optical delay lines, wavelength-division multiplexing, dataflow, and memory hierarchy optimization, ReFOCUS minimizes both conversion overhead and memory access energy. As a result, ReFOCUS achieves 2 × throughput, 2.2 × energy efficiency, and 1.36 × area efficiency compared to state-of-the-art photonic neural network accelerators.
items.abstract_zh:
近年来，人们非常关注实现低延迟和高吞吐量的卷积神经网络（CNN）推理。由于其固有的低延迟特性，集成光子学具有显着加快神经网络速度的潜力。最近，基于傅立叶光学的片上神经网络加速器已经得到展示，并为 CNN 加速实现了卓越的能源效率。通过结合傅立叶光学，可以通过片上透镜即时执行计算密集型卷积运算，与其他片上光子神经网络加速器相比，成本显着降低。这要归功于卷积定理和片上透镜计算的无源傅里叶变换所提供的复杂性降低。然而，光域和数字域之间的转换开销以及存储器访问能量仍然阻碍整体效率。

我们推出 ReFOCUS，这是一种基于联合变换相关器 (JTC) 的片上神经网络加速器，可通过光学缓冲器有效地重复使用光。通过结合光学延迟线、波分复用、数据流和内存层次结构优化，ReFOCUS 最大限度地减少了转换开销和内存访问能量。因此，与最先进的光子神经网络加速器相比，ReFOCUS 实现了 2 倍的吞吐量、2.2 倍的能源效率和 1.36 倍的面积效率。

items.title: SupeRBNN: Randomized Binary Neural Network Using Adiabatic Superconductor Josephson Devices.
items.abstract: Adiabatic Quantum-Flux-Parametron (AQFP) is a superconducting logic with extremely high energy efficiency. By employing the distinct polarity of current to denote logic ‘0’ and ‘1’, AQFP devices serve as excellent carriers for binary neural network (BNN) computations. Although recent research has made initial strides toward developing an AQFP-based BNN accelerator, several critical challenges remain, preventing the design from being a comprehensive solution. In this paper, we propose SupeRBNN, an AQFP-based randomized BNN acceleration framework that leverages software-hardware co-optimization to eventually make the AQFP devices a feasible solution for BNN acceleration. Specifically, we investigate the randomized behavior of the AQFP devices and analyze the impact of crossbar size on current attenuation, subsequently formulating the current amplitude into the values suitable for use in BNN computation. To tackle the accumulation problem and improve overall hardware performance, we propose a stochastic computing-based accumulation module and a clocking scheme adjustment-based circuit optimization method. To effectively train the BNN models that are compatible with the distinctive characteristics of AQFP devices, we further propose a novel randomized BNN training solution that utilizes algorithm-hardware co-optimization, enabling simultaneous optimization of hardware configurations. In addition, we propose implementing batch normalization matching and the weight rectified clamp method to further improve the overall performance. We validate our SupeRBNN framework across various datasets and network architectures, comparing it with implementations based on different technologies, including CMOS, ReRAM, and superconducting RSFQ/ERSFQ. Experimental results demonstrate that our design achieves an energy efficiency of approximately 7.8 × 104 times higher than that of the ReRAM-based BNN framework while maintaining a similar level of model accuracy. Furthermore, when compared with superconductor-based counterparts, our framework demonstrates at least two orders of magnitude higher energy efficiency.
items.abstract_zh: 绝热量子通量参量管（AQFP）是一种具有极高能效的超导逻辑。通过利用电流的不同极性来表示逻辑“0”和“1”，AQFP 器件成为二进制神经网络 (BNN) 计算的优秀载体。尽管最近的研究在开发基于 AQFP 的 BNN 加速器方面取得了初步进展，但仍然存在一些关键挑战，阻碍了设计成为全面的解决方案。在本文中，我们提出了 SuperRBNN，一种基于 AQFP 的随机 BNN 加速框架，利用软件-硬件协同优化，最终使 AQFP 设备成为 BNN 加速的可行解决方案。具体来说，我们研究了 AQFP 器件的随机行为，并分析了 Crossbar 尺寸对电流衰减的影响，随后将电流幅度公式化为适合 BNN 计算使用的值。为了解决累加问题并提高整体硬件性能，我们提出了一种基于随机计算的累加模块和一种基于时钟方案调整的电路优化方法。为了有效地训练与 AQFP 器件的独特特性兼容的 BNN 模型，我们进一步提出了一种新颖的随机 BNN 训练解决方案，该解决方案利用算法-硬件协同优化，实现硬件配置的同步优化。此外，我们建议实施批量归一化匹配和权重校正钳位方法以进一步提高整体性能。我们在各种数据集和网络架构中验证了我们的 SuperRBNN 框架，并将其与基于不同技术（包括 CMOS、ReRAM 和超导 RSFQ/ERSFQ）的实现进行比较。实验结果表明，我们的设计实现了比基于 ReRAM 的 BNN 框架高约 7.8 × 104 倍的能源效率，同时保持了相似的模型精度水平。此外，与基于超导体的对应结构相比，我们的框架表现出至少两个数量级的能源效率。

items.title: SUSHI: Ultra-High-Speed and Ultra-Low-Power Neuromorphic Chip Using Superconducting Single-Flux-Quantum Circuits.
items.abstract: The rapid single-flux-quantum (RSFQ) superconducting technology is highly promising due to its ultra-high-speed computation with ultra-low-power consumption, making it an ideal solution for the post-Moore era. In superconducting technology, information is encoded and processed based on pulses that resemble the neuronal pulses present in biological neural systems. This has led to a growing research focus on implementing neuromorphic processing using superconducting technology. However, current research on superconducting neuromorphic processing does not fully leverage the advantages of superconducting circuits due to incomplete neuromorphic design and approach. Although they have demonstrated the benefits of using superconducting technology for neuromorphic hardware, their designs are mostly incomplete, with only a few components validated, or based solely on simulation. This paper presents SUSHI (Superconducting neUromorphic proceSsing cHIp) to fully leverage the potential of superconducting neuromorphic processing. Based on three guiding principles and our architectural and methodological designs, we address existing challenges and enables the design of verifiable and fabricable superconducting neuromorphic chips. We fabricate and verify a chip of SUSHI using superconducting circuit technology. Successfully obtaining the correct inference results of a complete neural network on the chip, this is the first instance of neural networks being completely executed on a superconducting chip to the best of our knowledge. Our evaluation shows that using approximately 105 Josephson junctions, SUSHI achieves a peak neuromorphic processing performance of 1,355 giga-synaptic operations per second (GSOPS) and a power efficiency of 32,366 GSOPS per Watt (GSOPS/W). This power efficiency outperforms the state-of-the-art neuromorphic chips TrueNorth and Tianjic by 81 and 50 times, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 快速单通量量子（RSFQ）超导技术因其超高速计算和超低功耗而极具前景，使其成为后摩尔时代的理想解决方案。在超导技术中，信息是根据类似于生物神经系统中存在的神经元脉冲的脉冲进行编码和处理的。这导致人们越来越关注使用超导技术实现神经形态处理。然而，由于神经拟态设计和方法不完整，目前超导神经拟态处理的研究并没有充分发挥超导电路的优势。尽管他们已经展示了将超导技术用于神经形态硬件的好处，但他们的设计大多不完整，只有少数组件经过验证，或者仅基于模拟。本文提出了 SUSHI（超导神经形态处理芯片），以充分发挥超导神经形态处理的潜力。基于三个指导原则以及我们的架构和方法设计，我们解决了现有的挑战，并实现了可验证和可制造的超导神经形态芯片的设计。我们利用超导电路技术制造并验证了 SUSHI 芯片。在芯片上成功获得完整神经网络的正确推理结果，这是据我们所知神经网络完全在超导芯片上执行的第一个实例。我们的评估表明，使用大约 105 个约瑟夫森结，SUSHI 实现了每秒 1,355 次千兆突触操作 (GSOPS) 的峰值神经拟态处理性能和 32,366 GSOPS 每瓦 (GSOPS/W) 的功率效率。该功效比最先进的神经拟态芯片 TrueNorth 和 Tianjic 分别高出 81 倍和 50 倍。

items.title: Photon: A Fine-grained Sampled Simulation Methodology for GPU Workloads.
items.abstract:
GPUs, due to their massively-parallel computing architectures, provide high performance for data-parallel applications. However, existing GPU simulators are too slow to enable architects to quickly evaluate their hardware designs and software analysis studies. Sampled simulation methodologies are one common way to speed up CPU simulation. However, GPUs apply drastically different execution models that challenge the sampled simulation methods designed for CPU simulations. Recent GPU sampled simulation methodologies do not fully take advantage of the GPU’s special architecture features, such as limited types of basic blocks or warps. Moreover, these methods depend on up-front analysis via profiling tools or functional simulation, making them difficult to use.

To address this, we extensively studied the execution patterns of a variety of GPU workloads and propose Photon, a sampled simulation methodology tailored to GPUs. Photon incorporates methodologies that automatically consider different levels of GPU execution, such as kernels, warps, and basic blocks. Photon does not require up-front profiling of GPU workloads and utilizes a light-weight online analysis method based on the identification of highly repetitive software behavior. We evaluate Photon using a variety of GPU workloads, including real-world applications like VGG and ResNet. The final result shows that Photon reduces the simulation time needed to perform one inference of ResNet-152 with batch size 1 from 7.05 days to just 1.7 hours with a low sampling error of 10.7%.
items.abstract_zh:
GPU 凭借其大规模并行计算架构，可以为数据并行应用程序提供高性能。然而，现有的 GPU 模拟器速度太慢，无法让架构师快速评估其硬件设计和软件分析研究。采样仿真方法是加速 CPU 仿真的一种常见方法。然而，GPU 应用了截然不同的执行模型，这对为 CPU 模拟设计的采样模拟方法提出了挑战。最近的 GPU 采样模拟方法没有充分利用 GPU 的特殊架构功能，例如有限类型的基本块或扭曲。此外，这些方法依赖于通过分析工具或功能模拟进行的预先分析，这使得它们难以使用。

为了解决这个问题，我们广泛研究了各种 GPU 工作负载的执行模式，并提出了 Photon，这是一种针对 GPU 量身定制的采样模拟方法。 Photon 结合了自动考虑不同级别 GPU 执行的方法，例如内核、扭曲和基本块。 Photon 不需要预先分析 GPU 工作负载，并利用基于高度重复软件行为识别的轻量级在线分析方法。我们使用各种 GPU 工作负载（包括 VGG 和 ResNet 等实际应用程序）来评估 Photon。最终结果表明，Photon 将批量大小为 1 的 ResNet-152 执行一次推理所需的模拟时间从 7.05 天减少到仅 1.7 小时，采样误差低至 10.7%。

items.title: Bucket Getter: A Bucket-based Processing Engine for Low-bit Block Floating Point (BFP) DNNs.
items.abstract:
Block floating point (BFP), an efficient numerical system for deep neural networks (DNNs), achieves a good trade-off between dynamic range and hardware costs. Specifically, prior works have demonstrated that BFP format with 3 ∼ 5-bit mantissa can achieve FP32-comparable accuracy for various DNN workloads. We find that the floating-point adder (FP-Acc), which contains modules for normalization, alignment, addition, and fixed-point-to-floating-point (FXP2FP) conversion, dominates the power and area overheads, hence hindering the hardware efficiency of state-of-the-art low-bit BFP processing engines (BFP-PE).

To mitigate the identified issue, we propose Bucket Getter, a novel architecture implemented with the following techniques for improving the energy efficiency and area efficiency: 1) we propose a bucket-based accumulation unit prior to FP-Acc, which uses multiple small accumulators (buckets) that are responsible for a small range of exponent values where intermediate results are distributed accordingly, and b) accumulate in FXP domain. This reduces the activities of power-hungry a) alignment and b) format conversion units. 2) We propose inter-bucket carry propagation, which allows each bucket to transmit overflow to an adjacent bucket and further reduces the activity of FP-Acc. 3) We propose an out-of-bound-aware, adaptive and circular bucket accumulator to significantly reduce the overhead for the bucket-based accumulator. 4) We further propose shared FP-Acc, which exploits the low activity of FP-Acc in the bucket-based architecture and shares an FP-Acc across several MAC engines to reduce the area overhead of FP-Acc.

The experimental results based on TSMC 40 nm demonstrate that our proposed Bucket Getter architecture reduces the computational energy by up to 57% and improves the area efficiency by up to 1.4 ×, compared to state-of-the-art BFP engines across seven representative DNN models. Furthermore, our proposed approach helps state-of-the-art floating-point engines reduce up to 32% of the PE area and 81% of the PE power.
items.abstract_zh:
块浮点 (BFP) 是一种用于深度神经网络 (DNN) 的高效数值系统，在动态范围和硬件成本之间实现了良好的权衡。具体来说，之前的工作已经证明，具有 3 ∼ 5 位尾数的 BFP 格式可以针对各种 DNN 工作负载实现与 FP32 相当的精度。我们发现浮点加法器 (FP-Acc) 包含标准化、对齐、加法和定点到浮点 (FXP2FP) 转换模块，在功耗和面积开销中占主导地位，从而阻碍了最先进的低位 BFP 处理引擎 (BFP-PE) 的硬件效率。

为了缓解已发现的问题，我们提出了 Bucket Getter，这是一种采用以下技术实现的新颖架构，用于提高能源效率和面积效率：1）我们在 FP-Acc 之前提出了一种基于桶的累加单元，它使用多个小型累加器（桶）负责小范围的指数值，其中中间结果相应地分布，b）在 FXP 域中累加。这减少了耗电的 a) 对齐和 b) 格式转换单元的活动。 2）我们提出桶间进位传播，允许每个桶将溢出传输到相邻桶，并进一步减少 FP-Acc 的活动。 3）我们提出了一种出界感知、自适应和循环桶累加器，以显着减少基于桶的累加器的开销。 4）我们进一步提出共享FP-Acc，它利用基于桶的架构中FP-Acc的低活动性，并在多个MAC引擎之间共享FP-Acc以减少FP-Acc的区域开销。

基于 TSMC 40 nm 的实验结果表明，与七个代表性 DNN 模型中最先进的 BFP 引擎相比，我们提出的 Bucket Getter 架构可将计算能量降低高达 57%，并将面积效率提高高达 1.4 倍。此外，我们提出的方法有助于最先进的浮点引擎减少高达 32% 的 PE 面积和 81% 的 PE 功率。

items.title: AQ2PNN: Enabling Two-party Privacy-Preserving Deep Neural Network Inference with Adaptive Quantization.
items.abstract:
The growing prevalence of Machine Learning as a Service (MLaaS) enables a wide range of applications but simultaneously raises numerous security and privacy concerns. A key issue involves the potential privacy exposure of involved parties, such as the customer’s input data and the vendor’s model. Consequently, two-party computing (2PC) has emerged as a promising solution to safeguard the privacy of different parties during deep neural network (DNN) inference. However, the state-of-the-art (SOTA) 2PC-DNN techniques are tailored explicitly to traditional instruction set architecture (ISA) systems like CPUs and CPU+GPU. This reliance on ISA systems significantly constrains their energy efficiency, as these architectures typically employ 32- or 64-bit instruction sets. In contrast, the possibilities of harnessing dynamic and adaptive quantization to build high-performance 2PC-DNNs remain largely unexplored due to the lack of compatible algorithms and hardware accelerators.

To mitigate the bottleneck of SOTA solutions and fill the existing research gaps, this work investigates the construction of 2PC-DNNs on field programmable gate arrays (FPGAs). We introduce AQ2PNN, an end-to-end framework that effectively employs adaptive quantization schemes to develop high-performance 2PC-DNNs on FPGAs. From an algorithmic perspective, AQ2PNN introduces an innovative 2PC-ReLU method to replace Yao’s Garbled Circuits (GC). Regarding hardware, AQ2PNN employs an extensive set of building blocks for linear operators, non-linear operators, and a specialized Oblivious Transfer (OT) module for secure data exchange, respectively. These algorithm-hardware co-designed modules extremely utilize the fine-grained reconfigurability of FPGAs, to adapt the data bit-width of different DNN layers in the ciphertext domain, thereby reducing communication overhead between parties without compromising DNN performance, such as accuracy. We thoroughly assess AQ2PNN using widely adopted DNN architectures, including ResNet18, ResNet50, and VGG16, all trained on ImageNet and producing quantized models. Experimental results demonstrate that AQ2PNN outperforms SOTA solutions, achieving significantly reduced communication overhead by, improved energy efficiency by 26.3 ×, and comparable or even superior throughput and accuracy.
items.abstract_zh:
机器学习即服务 (MLaaS) 的日益普及带来了广泛的应用，但同时也引发了许多安全和隐私问题。一个关键问题涉及相关各方的潜在隐私暴露，例如客户的输入数据和供应商的模型。因此，两方计算（2PC）已成为在深度神经网络（DNN）推理过程中保护各方隐私的有前途的解决方案。然而，最先进的 (SOTA) 2PC-DNN 技术是专门针对传统指令集架构 (ISA) 系统（如 CPU 和 CPU+GPU）而定制的。这种对 ISA 系统的依赖极大地限制了它们的能源效率，因为这些架构通常采用 32 位或 64 位指令集。相比之下，由于缺乏兼容的算法和硬件加速器，利用动态和自适应量化来构建高性能 2PC-DNN 的可能性在很大程度上仍未得到探索。

为了缓解 SOTA 解决方案的瓶颈并填补现有的研究空白，这项工作研究了在现场可编程门阵列 (FPGA) 上构建 2PC-DNN。我们介绍 AQ2PNN，这是一种端到端框架，可有效地采用自适应量化方案在 FPGA 上开发高性能 2PC-DNN。从算法角度来看，AQ2PNN 引入了创新的 2PC-ReLU 方法来替代 Yao 的乱码电路（GC）。在硬件方面，AQ2PNN 分别采用了一组广泛的构建块用于线性算子、非线性算子以及用于安全数据交换的专门的不经意传输 (OT) 模块。这些算法-硬件协同设计的模块极大地利用了FPGA的细粒度可重构性，以适应密文域中不同DNN层的数据位宽，从而在不影响DNN性能（例如准确性）的情况下减少各方之间的通信开销。我们使用广泛采用的 DNN 架构（包括 ResNet18、ResNet50 和 VGG16）彻底评估 AQ2PNN，所有架构均在 ImageNet 上进行训练并生成量化模型。实验结果表明，AQ2PNN 的性能优于 SOTA 解决方案，显着降低了通信开销，将能源效率提高了 26.3 倍，并实现了相当甚至更高的吞吐量和精度。

items.title: Architectural Support for Optimizing Huge Page Selection Within the OS.
items.abstract:
Irregular, memory-intensive applications often incur high translation lookaside buffer (TLB) miss rates that result in significant address translation overheads. Employing huge pages is an effective way to reduce these overheads, however in real systems the number of available huge pages can be limited when system memory is nearly full and/or fragmented. Thus, huge pages must be used selectively to back application memory. This work demonstrates that choosing memory regions that incur the most TLB misses for huge page promotion best reduces address translation overheads. We call these regions High reUse TLB-sensitive data (HUBs). Unlike prior work which relies on expensive per-page software counters to identify promotion regions, we propose new architectural support to identify these regions dynamically at application runtime.

We propose a promotion candidate cache (PCC) that identifies HUB candidates based on hardware page table walks after a last-level TLB miss. This small, fixed-size structure tracks huge page-aligned regions (consisting of N base pages), ranks them based on observed page table walk frequency, and only keeps the most frequently accessed ones. Evaluated on applications of various memory intensity, our approach successfully identifies application pages incurring the highest address translation overheads. Our approach demonstrates that with the help of a PCC, the OS only needs to promote of the application footprint to achieve more than of the peak achievable performance, yielding 1.19-1.33 × speedups over 4KB base pages alone. In real systems where memory is typically fragmented, the PCC outperforms Linux’s page promotion policy by (when 50% of total memory is fragmented) and (when 90% of total memory is fragmented) respectively.
items.abstract_zh:
不规则的内存密集型应用程序通常会产生较高的转换后备缓冲区 (TLB) 未命中率，从而导致显着的地址转换开销。使用大页面是减少这些开销的有效方法，但是在实际系统中，当系统内存接近满和/或碎片时，可用大页面的数量可能会受到限制。因此，必须有选择地使用大页面来支持应用程序内存。这项工作表明，为大页升级选择导致 TLB 未命中最多的内存区域可以最大程度地减少地址转换开销。我们将这些区域称为高重用 TLB 敏感数据 (HUB)。与之前依赖昂贵的每页软件计数器来识别升级区域的工作不同，我们提出了新的架构支持来在应用程序运行时动态地识别这些区域。

我们提出了一种升级候选缓存（PCC），它根据最后一级 TLB 未命中后的硬件页表遍历来识别 HUB 候选。这个小型、固定大小的结构跟踪巨大的页对齐区域（由 N 个基页组成），根据观察到的页表遍历频率对它们进行排名，并且只保留最常访问的区域。通过对各种内存强度的应用程序进行评估，我们的方法成功地识别出产生最高地址转换开销的应用程序页面。我们的方法表明，在 PCC 的帮助下，操作系统只需增加应用程序占用空间即可实现超过可达到的峰值性能，仅比 4KB 基页就产生 1.19-1.33 倍的加速。在内存通常存在碎片的实际系统中，PCC 的性能分别优于 Linux 的页面提升策略（当总内存的 50% 存在碎片时）和（当总内存的 90% 存在碎片时）。

items.title: Rigorous Evaluation of Computer Processors with Statistical Model Checking.
items.abstract: Experiments with computer processors must account for the inherent variability in executions. Prior work has shown that real systems exhibit variability, and random effects must be injected into simulators to account for it. Thus, we can run multiple executions of a given benchmark and generate a distribution of results. Prior work uses standard statistical techniques that are not suitable. While the result distributions may take any forms that are unknown a priori, many works naively assume they are Gaussian, which can be far from the truth. To allow rigorous evaluation for arbitrary result distributions, we introduce statistical model checking (SMC) to the world of computer architecture. SMC is a statistical technique that is used in research communities that depend heavily on statistical guarantees. SMC provides a rigorous mathematical methodology that employs experimental sampling for probabilistic evaluation of properties of interest, such that one can determine with a desired confidence whether a property (e.g., System X is 1.1x faster than System Y) is true or not. SMC alone is not enough for computer architects to draw conclusions based on their data. We create an end-to-end framework called SMC for Processor Analysis (SPA) which utilizes SMC techniques to provide insightful conclusions given experimental data.
items.abstract_zh: 使用计算机处理器进行的实验必须考虑执行中固有的可变性。先前的工作表明，真实系统表现出可变性，必须将随机效应注入模拟器中来解释它。因此，我们可以运行给定基准的多次执行并生成结果分布。先前的工作使用了不合适的标准统计技术。虽然结果分布可能采取任何先验未知的形式，但许多作品天真地假设它们是高斯​​分布，这可能与事实相去甚远。为了对任意结果分布进行严格评估，我们将统计模型检查（SMC）引入计算机体系结构领域。 SMC 是一种统计技术，用于严重依赖统计保证的研究界。 SMC 提供了一种严格的数学方法，该方法采用实验采样对感兴趣的属性进行概率评估，以便人们能够以所需的置信度确定某个属性（例如，系统 X 比系统 Y 快 1.1 倍）是否真实。仅 SMC 不足以让计算机架构师根据他们的数据得出结论。我们创建了一个名为 SMC for Processor Analysis (SPA) 的端到端框架，该框架利用 SMC 技术根据实验数据提供富有洞察力的结论。

items.title: ACRE: Accelerating Random Forests for Explainability.
items.abstract:
As machine learning models become more widespread, they are being increasingly applied in applications that heavily impact people’s lives (e.g., medical diagnoses, judicial system sentences, etc.). Several communities are thus calling for ML models to be not only accurate, but also explainable. To achieve this, recommendations must be augmented with explanations summarizing how each recommendation outcome is derived. Explainable Random Forest (XRF) models are popular choices in this space, as they are both very accurate and can be augmented with explainability functionality, allowing end-users to learn how and why a specific outcome was reached. However, the limitations of XRF models hamper their adoption, the foremost being the high computational demands associated with training such models to support high-accuracy classifications, while also annotating them with explainability meta-data.

In response, we present ACRE, a hardware accelerator to support XRF model training. ACRE accelerates key operations that bottleneck performance, while maintaining meta-data critical to support explainability. It leverages a novel Processing-in-Memory hardware unit, co-located with banks of a 3D-stacked High-Bandwidth Memory (HBM). The unit locally accelerates the execution of key training computations, boosting effective data-transfer bandwidth. Our evaluation shows that, when ACRE augments HBM3 memory, it yields an average system-level training performance improvement of 26.6x, compared to a baseline multicore processor solution with DDR4 memory. Further, ACRE yields a 2.5x improvement when compared to an HBM3 architecture baseline, increasing to 5x when not bottlenecked by a 16k-thread limit in the host. Finally, due to much higher performance, we observe that ACRE provides a 16.5x energy reduction overall, over a DDR baseline.
items.abstract_zh:
随着机器学习模型变得越来越普遍，它们越来越多地应用于严重影响人们生活的应用（例如医疗诊断、司法系统判决等）。因此，一些社区呼吁机器学习模型不仅要准确，而且要可解释。为了实现这一目标，必须通过总结每个建议结果如何得出的解释来补充建议。可解释的随机森林 (XRF) 模型是该领域的热门选择，因为它们非常准确，并且可以通过可解释性功能进行增强，从而允许最终用户了解如何以及为何达到特定结果。然而，XRF 模型的局限性阻碍了它们的采用，最重要的是与训练此类模型以支持高精度分类相关的高计算需求，同时还用可解释性元数据对其进行注释。

作为回应，我们推出了 ACRE，一个支持 XRF 模型训练的硬件加速器。 ACRE 加速了导致性能瓶颈的关键操作，同时维护对支持可解释性至关重要的元数据。它利用新颖的内存处理硬件单元，与 3D 堆叠高带宽内存 (HBM) 组位于同一位置。该单元可在本地加速关键训练计算的执行，从而提高有效数据传输带宽。我们的评估表明，当 ACRE 增强 HBM3 内存时，与采用 DDR4 内存的基准多核处理器解决方案相比，它的平均系统级训练性能提高了 26.6 倍。此外，与 HBM3 架构基准相比，ACRE 的性能提高了 2.5 倍，在主机中不受 16k 线程限制的瓶颈影响时，性能提高到 5 倍。最后，由于性能更高，我们观察到 ACRE 总体能耗比 DDR 基准降低了 16.5 倍。

items.title: Hardware Support for Constant-Time Programming.
items.abstract:
Side-channel attacks are one of the rising security concerns in modern computing platforms. Observing this, researchers have proposed both hardware-based and software-based strategies to mitigate side-channel attacks, targeting not only on-chip caches but also other hardware components like memory controllers and on-chip networks. While hardware-based solutions to side-channel attacks are usually costly to implement as they require modifications to the underlying hardware, software-based solutions are more practical as they can work on unmodified hardware. One of the recent software-based solutions is constant-time programming, which tries to transform an input program to be protected against side-channel attacks such that an operation working on a data element/block to be protected would execute in an amount of time that is independent of the input. Unfortunately, while quite effective from a security angle, constant-time programming can lead to severe performance penalties.

Motivated by this observation, in this paper, we explore novel hardware support to make constant-time programming much more efficient than its current implementations. Specifically, we present a new hardware component that can greatly improve the performance of constant-time programs with large memory footprints. The key idea in our approach is to add a small structure into the architecture and two accompanying instructions, which collectively expose the existence/dirtiness information of multiple cache lines to the application program, so that the latter can perform more efficient side-channel mitigation. Our experimental evaluation using three benchmark programs with secret data clearly show the effectiveness of the proposed approach over a state-of-the-art implementation of constant-time programming. Specifically, in the three benchmark programs tested, our approach leads to about 7x reduction in performance overheads over the state-of-the-art approach.
items.abstract_zh:
Side-channel attacks are one of the rising security concerns in modern computing platforms.观察到这一点，研究人员提出了基于硬件和基于软件的策略来减轻旁道攻击，不仅针对片上缓存，还针对内存控制器和片上网络等其他硬件组件。虽然针对侧信道攻击的基于硬件的解决方案通常实施起来成本高昂，因为它们需要修改底层硬件，但基于软件的解决方案更实用，因为它们可以在未修改的硬件上工作。最近基于软件的解决方案之一是恒定时间编程，它试图转换输入程序以防止侧信道攻击，以便对要保护的数据元素/块进行的操作将在独立于输入的时间内执行。 Unfortunately, while quite effective from a security angle, constant-time programming can lead to severe performance penalties.

受这一观察的启发，在本文中，我们探索了新颖的硬件支持，以使恒定时间编程比当前的实现更加高效。具体来说，我们提出了一种新的硬件组件，可以极大地提高具有大内存占用的恒定时间程序的性能。我们方法的关键思想是在架构中添加一个小结构和两个附带指令，它们共同向应用程序公开多个缓存行的存在/脏信息，以便后者可以执行更有效的侧通道缓解。我们使用三个带有秘密数据的基准程序进行的实验评估清楚地表明了所提出的方法相对于最先进的恒定时间编程实现的有效性。具体来说，在测试的三个基准程序中，我们的方法使性能开销比最先进的方法减少了约 7 倍。

items.title: Snake: A Variable-length Chain-based Prefetching for GPUs.
items.abstract: Graphics Processing Units (GPUs) utilize memory hierarchy and Thread-Level Parallelism (TLP) to tolerate off-chip memory latency, which is a significant bottleneck for memory-bound applications. However, parallel threads generate a large number of memory requests, which increases the average memory latency and degrades cache performance due to high contention. Prefetching is an effective technique to reduce memory access latency, and prior research shows the positive impact of stride-based prefetching on GPU performance. However, existing prefetching methods only rely on fixed strides. To address this limitation, this paper proposes a new prefetching technique, Snake, which is built upon chains of variable strides, using throttling and memory decoupling strategies. Snake achieves 80% coverage and 75% accuracy in prefetching demand memory requests, resulting in a 17% improvement in total GPU performance and energy consumption for memory-bound General-Purpose Graphics Processing Unit (GPGPU) applications.
items.abstract_zh: 图形处理单元 (GPU) 利用内存层次结构和线程级并行性 (TLP) 来容忍片外内存延迟，这是内存受限应用程序的一个重要瓶颈。然而，并行线程会生成大量内存请求，这会增加平均内存延迟，并因高争用而降低缓存性能。预取是减少内存访问延迟的有效技术，之前的研究表明基于步幅的预取对 GPU 性能具有积极影响。然而，现有的预取方法仅依赖于固定步幅。为了解决这个限制，本文提出了一种新的预取技术 Snake，它建立在可变步幅链上，使用节流和内存解耦策略。 Snake 在预取需求内存请求方面实现了 80% 的覆盖率和 75% 的准确度，从而使受内存限制的通用图形处理单元 (GPGPU) 应用程序的 GPU 总性能和能耗提高了 17%。

items.title: Decoupled Vector Runahead.
items.abstract: We present Decoupled Vector Runahead (DVR), an in-core prefetching technique, executing separately to the main application thread, that exploits massive amounts of memory-level parallelism to improve the performance of applications featuring indirect memory accesses. DVR dynamically infers loop bounds at run-time, recognizing striding loads, and vectorizing subsequent instructions that are part of an indirect chain. It proactively issues memory accesses for the resulting loads far into the future, even when the out-of-order core has not yet stalled, bringing their data into the L1 cache, and thus providing timely prefetches for the main thread. DVR can adjust the degree of vectorization at run-time, vectorize the same chain of indirect memory accesses across multiple invocations of an inner loop, and efficiently handle branch divergence along the vectorized chain. DVR runs as an on-demand, speculative, in-order, lightweight hardware subthread alongside the main thread within the core and incurs a minimal hardware overhead of only 1139 bytes. Relative to a large superscalar 5-wide out-of-order baseline and Vector Runahead — a recent microarchitectural technique to accelerate indirect memory accesses on out-of-order processors — DVR delivers 2.4 × and 2 × higher performance, respectively, for a set of graph analytics, database, and HPC workloads.
items.abstract_zh: 我们提出了解耦矢量运行 (DVR)，这是一种核心预取技术，单独执行到主应用程序线程，它利用大量内存级并行性来提高具有间接内存访问功能的应用程序的性能。 DVR 在运行时动态推断循环边界，识别跨步负载，并对属于间接链一部分的后续指令进行矢量化。即使无序核心尚未停止，它也会主动为将来产生的负载发出内存访问，将其数据放入 L1 缓存，从而为主线程提供及时的预取。 DVR 可​​以在运行时调整矢量化程度，对内部循环的多次调用之间的同一间接内存访问链进行矢量化，并有效地处理矢量化链上的分支分歧。 DVR 作为按需、推测、有序、轻量级硬件子线程与核心内的主线程一起运行，并产生仅 1139 字节的最小硬件开销。 Relative to a large superscalar 5-wide out-of-order baseline and Vector Runahead — a recent microarchitectural technique to accelerate indirect memory accesses on out-of-order processors — DVR delivers 2.4 × and 2 × higher performance, respectively, for a set of graph analytics, database, and HPC workloads.

items.title: TeAAL: A Declarative Framework for Modeling Sparse Tensor Accelerators.
items.abstract:
Over the past few years, the explosion in sparse tensor algebra workloads has led to a corresponding rise in domain-specific accelerators to service them. Due to the irregularity present in sparse tensors, these accelerators employ a wide variety of novel solutions to achieve good performance. At the same time, prior work on design-flexible sparse accelerator modeling does not express this full range of design features, making it difficult to understand the impact of each design choice and compare or extend the state-of-the-art.

To address this, we propose TeAAL: a language and simulator generator for the concise and precise specification and evaluation of sparse tensor algebra accelerators. We use TeAAL to represent and evaluate four disparate state-of-the-art accelerators—ExTensor, Gamma, OuterSPACE, and SIGMA—and verify that it reproduces their performance with high accuracy. Finally, we demonstrate the potential of TeAAL as a tool for designing new accelerators by showing how it can be used to speed up vertex-centric programming accelerators—achieving 1.9 × on BFS and 1.2 × on SSSP over GraphDynS.
items.abstract_zh:
在过去的几年里，稀疏张量代数工作负载的爆炸式增长导致了为其提供服务的特定领域加速器的相应增加。由于稀疏张量存在不规则性，这些加速器采用各种新颖的解决方案来实现良好的性能。与此同时，先前关于设计灵活的稀疏加速器建模的工作并没有表达这种全方位的设计特征，因此很难理解每个设计选择的影响并比较或扩展最先进的技术。

为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 TeAAL：一种语言和模拟器生成器，用于稀疏张量代数加速器的简洁和精确的规范和评估。我们使用 TeAAL 来表示和评估四种不同的最先进的加速器——ExTensor、Gamma、OuterSPACE 和 SIGMA——并验证它是否能够高精度地再现它们的性能。最后，我们通过展示 TeAAL 如何用于加速以顶点为中心的编程加速器（通过 GraphDynS 在 BFS 上实现 1.9 倍，在 SSSP 上实现 1.2 倍）来展示 TeAAL 作为设计新加速器的工具的潜力。

items.title: AutoCC: Automatic Discovery of Covert Channels in Time-Shared Hardware.
items.abstract:
Covert channels enable information leakage between security domains that should be isolated by observing execution differences in shared hardware. These channels can appear in any stateful shared resource, including caches, predictors, and accelerators. Previous works have identified many vulnerable components, demonstrating and defending against attacks via reverse engineering. However, this approach requires much human effort and reasoning. With the Cambrian explosion of specialized hardware, it is becoming increasingly difficult to identify all vulnerabilities manually.

To tackle this challenge, we propose AutoCC, a methodology that leverages formal property verification (FPV) to automatically discover covert channels in hardware that is shared between processes. AutoCC operates at the register-transfer level (RTL) to exhaustively examine any machine state left by a process after a context switch that creates an execution difference. Upon finding such a difference, AutoCC provides a precise execution trace showing how the information was encoded into the machine state and recovered.

Leveraging AutoCC’s flow to generate FPV testbenches that apply our methodology, we evaluated it on four open-source hardware projects, including two RISC-V cores and two accelerators. Without hand-written code or directed tests, AutoCC uncovered known covert channels (within minutes instead of many hours of test-driven emulations) and unknown ones. Although AutoCC is primarily intended to find covert channels, our evaluation has also found RTL bugs, demonstrating that AutoCC is an effective tool to test both the security and reliability of hardware designs.
items.abstract_zh:
隐蔽通道会导致安全域之间的信息泄漏，这些安全域应该通过观​​察共享硬件中的执行差异来隔离。这些通道可以出现在任何有状态共享资源中，包括缓存、预测器和加速器。之前的工作已经识别出许多易受攻击的组件，通过逆向工程展示和防御攻击。然而，这种方法需要大量的人力和推理。随着专用硬件的寒武纪爆发，手动识别所有漏洞变得越来越困难。

为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了 AutoCC，这是一种利用形式属性验证 (FPV) 自动发现进程之间共享的硬件中的隐蔽通道的方法。 AutoCC 在寄存器传输级别 (RTL) 运行，以详尽地检查在产生执行差异的上下文切换后进程留下的任何机器状态。发现这种差异后，AutoCC 会提供精确的执行跟踪，显示信息如何编码到机器状态并恢复。

利用 AutoCC 的流程生成应用我们方法的 FPV 测试平台，我们在四个开源硬件项目上对其进行了评估，包括两个 RISC-V 内核和两个加速器。无需手写代码或定向测试，AutoCC 即可发现已知的隐蔽通道（只需几分钟，而不是测试驱动的模拟的多个小时）和未知通道。虽然AutoCC的主要目的是寻找隐蔽通道，但我们的评估也发现了RTL错误，这表明AutoCC是测试硬件设计安全性和可靠性的有效工具。

items.title: CLIP: Load Criticality based Data Prefetching for Bandwidth-constrained Many-core Systems.
items.abstract:
Hardware prefetching is a latency-hiding technique that hides the costly off-chip DRAM accesses. However, state-of-the-art prefetchers fail to deliver performance improvement in the case of many-core systems with constrained DRAM bandwidth. For SPEC CPU2017 homogeneous workloads, the state-of-the-art Berti L1 prefetcher, on a 64-core system with four and eight DRAM channels, incurs performance slowdowns of 24% and 16%, respectively. However, Berti improves performance by 35% if we use an unrealistic configuration of 64 DRAM channels for a 64-core system (one DRAM channel per core).

Prior approaches such as prefetch throttling and critical load prefetching are not effective in the presence of state-of-the-art prefetchers. Existing load criticality predictors fail to detect loads that are critical in the presence of hardware prefetching and the best predictor provides an average critical load prediction accuracy of 41%. Existing prefetch throttling techniques use prefetch accuracy as one of the primary metrics. However, these techniques offer limited benefits for state-of-the-art prefetchers that deliver high prefetch accuracy and use prefetcher-specific throttling and filtering.

We propose CLIP, a novel load criticality predictor for hardware prefetching with constrained DRAM bandwidth. Our load criticality predictor provides an average accuracy of more than 93% and as high as 100%. CLIP also filters out the critical loads that lead to accurate prefetching. For a 64-core system with eight DRAM channels, CLIP improves the effectiveness of state-of-the-art Berti prefetcher by 24% and 9% for 45 and 200 64-core homogeneous and heterogeneous workload mixes, respectively. We show that CLIP is equally effective in the presence of other state-of-the-art L1 and L2 prefetchers. Overall, CLIP incurs a storage overhead of 1.56KB/core.
items.abstract_zh:
Hardware prefetching is a latency-hiding technique that hides the costly off-chip DRAM accesses. However, state-of-the-art prefetchers fail to deliver performance improvement in the case of many-core systems with constrained DRAM bandwidth.对于 SPEC CPU2017 同质工作负载，最先进的 Berti L1 预取器在具有 4 个和 8 个 DRAM 通道的 64 核系统上分别导致性能下降 24% 和 16%。然而，如果我们对 64 核系统使用不切实际的 64 个 DRAM 通道配置（每个核心一个 DRAM 通道），Berti 的性能将提高 35%。

Prior approaches such as prefetch throttling and critical load prefetching are not effective in the presence of state-of-the-art prefetchers.现有的负载关键性预测器无法检测存在硬件预取的情况下的关键负载，而最佳预测器提供的平均关键负载预测精度为 41%。 Existing prefetch throttling techniques use prefetch accuracy as one of the primary metrics.然而，这些技术为最先进的预取器带来的好处有限，这些预取器可提供高预取精度并使用预取器特定的限制和过滤。

我们提出了 CLIP，一种新颖的负载关键预测器，用于在 DRAM 带宽受限的情况下进行硬件预取。我们的负载关键预测器的平均准确度超过 93%，最高可达 100%。 CLIP 还过滤掉导致准确预取的关键负载。对于具有 8 个 DRAM 通道的 64 核系统，对于 45 和 200 64 核同构和异构工作负载混合，CLIP 将最先进的 Berti 预取器的效率分别提高了 24% 和 9%。我们证明，在存在其他最先进的 L1 和 L2 预取器的情况下，CLIP 同样有效。总体而言，CLIP 产生的存储开销为 1.56KB/核心。

items.title: XFM: Accelerated Software-Defined Far Memory.
items.abstract: DRAM constitutes over 50% of server cost and 75% of the embodied carbon footprint of a server. To mitigate DRAM cost, far memory architectures have emerged. They can be separated into two broad categories: software-defined far memory (SFM) and disaggregated far memory (DFM). In this work, we compare the cost of SFM and DFM in terms of their required capital investment, operational expense, and carbon footprint. We show that, for applications whose data sets are compressible and have predictable memory access patterns, it takes several years for a DFM to break even with an equivalent capacity SFM in terms of cost and sustainability. We then introduce XFM, a near-memory accelerated SFM architecture, which exploits the coldness of data during SFM-initiated swap ins and outs. XFM leverages refresh cycles to seamlessly switch the access control of DRAM between the CPU and near-memory accelerator. XFM parallelizes near-memory accelerator accesses with row refreshes and removes the memory interference caused by SFM swap ins and outs. We modify an open source far memory implementation to implement a full-stack, user-level XFM. Our experimental results use a combination of an FPGA implementation, simulation, and analytical modeling to show that XFM eliminates memory bandwidth utilization when performing compression and decompression operations with SFM s of capacities up to 1TB. The memory and cache utilization reductions translate to 5 ∼ 27% improvement in the combined performance of co-running applications.
items.abstract_zh: DRAM 占服务器成本的 50% 以上，占服务器隐含碳足迹的 75%。为了降低 DRAM 成本，出现了远内存架构。它们可以分为两大类：软件定义远存储器（SFM）和分解远存储器（DFM）。在这项工作中，我们从所需的资本投资、运营费用和碳足迹方面比较了 SFM 和 DFM 的成本。我们表明，对于数据集可压缩且具有可预测内存访问模式的应用程序，DFM 需要几年的时间才能在成本和可持续性方面与同等容量的 SFM 实现收支平衡。然后我们介绍 XFM，这是一种近内存加速的 SFM 架构，它在 SFM 发起的交换进出期间利用了数据的冷度。 XFM 利用刷新周期在 CPU 和近内存加速器之间无缝切换 DRAM 的访问控制。 XFM 将近内存加速器访问与行刷新并行化，并消除了 SFM 换入换出造成的内存干扰。我们修改开源远内存实现来实现全栈、用户级 XFM。我们的实验结果结合了 FPGA 实现、仿真和分析建模，表明 XFM 在使用容量高达 1TB 的 SFM 执行压缩和解压缩操作时消除了内存带宽占用。内存和缓存利用率的降低意味着共同运行应用程序的综合性能提高了 5 ∼ 27%。

items.title: Branch Target Buffer Organizations.
items.abstract: To accommodate very large instruction footprints, modern high-performance processors rely on fetch directed instruction prefetching through huge branch predictors and a hierarchy of Branch Target Buffers (BTBs). Recently, significant effort has been undertaken to reduce the footprint of each branch in the BTB, in order to either minimize the storage occupied by the BTB on die, or to increase the number of tracked branches at iso-storage. However, designing for branch density, while necessary, is only one dimension of BTB efficacy. In particular, BTB entry organization plays a significant role in improving instruction fetch throughput, which is a necessary step towards increased performance. In this paper, we first revisit the advantages and drawbacks of three classical BTB organizations in the context of multi-level BTB hierarchies. We then consider three possible improvements to increase the fetch PC throughput of the Region BTB and Block BTB organizations, bridging most of the performance gap with the impractical but highly storage-efficient Instruction BTB organization, thus paving the way for future very high fetch throughput machines.
items.abstract_zh: 为了适应非常大的指令占用空间，现代高性能处理器依赖于通过巨大的分支预测器和分支目标缓冲区 (BTB) 层次结构进行提取定向指令预取。最近，为了减少 BTB 中每个分支的占用空间，人们付出了巨大的努力，以便最大限度地减少芯片上 BTB 占用的存储空间，或者增加 iso 存储中跟踪的分支数量。 However, designing for branch density, while necessary, is only one dimension of BTB efficacy.特别是，BTB 条目组织在提高指令读取吞吐量方面发挥着重要作用，这是提高性能的必要步骤。 In this paper, we first revisit the advantages and drawbacks of three classical BTB organizations in the context of multi-level BTB hierarchies.然后，我们考虑三种可能的改进，以提高区域 BTB 和块 BTB 组织的获取 PC 吞吐量，弥补与不切实际但存储效率高的指令 BTB 组织的大部分性能差距，从而为未来非常高的获取吞吐量机器铺平道路。

items.title: Strix: An End-to-End Streaming Architecture with Two-Level Ciphertext Batching for Fully Homomorphic Encryption with Programmable Bootstrapping.
items.abstract:
Homomorphic encryption (HE) is a type of cryptography that allows computations to be performed on encrypted data. The technique relies on learning with errors problem, where data is hidden under noise for security. To avoid excessive noise, bootstrapping is used to reset the noise level in the ciphertext, but it requires a large key and is computationally expensive. The fully homomorphic encryption over the torus (TFHE) scheme offers a faster and programmable bootstrapping (PBS) algorithm, which is crucial for many privacy-focused applications. Nonetheless, the current TFHE scheme does not support ciphertext packing, resulting in low-throughput performance. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work that thoroughly analyzes TFHE bootstrapping, identifies the TFHE acceleration bottleneck in GPUs, and proposes a hardware TFHE accelerator to solve the bottleneck.

We begin by identifying the TFHE acceleration bottleneck in GPUs due to the blind rotation fragmentation problem. This can be improved by increasing the batch size in PBS. We propose a two-level batching approach to enhance the batch size in PBS. To implement this solution efficiently, we introduce Strix, utilizing a streaming and fully pipelined architecture with specialized units to accelerate ciphertext processing in TFHE. Specifically, we propose a novel microarchitecture for decomposition in TFHE, suitable for processing streaming data at high throughput. We also employ a fully-pipelined FFT microarchitecture to address the memory access bottleneck and improve its performance through a folding scheme, achieving 2 × throughput improvement and 1.7 × area reduction. Strix achieves over 1, 067 × and 37 × higher throughput in running TFHE with PBS than the state-of-the-art implementation on CPU and GPU, respectively, surpassing the state-of-the-art TFHE accelerator, MATCHA, by 7.4 ×.
items.abstract_zh:
同态加密 (HE) 是一种允许对加密数据执行计算的密码学。该技术依赖于错误学习问题，其中数据隐藏在噪声下以确保安全。为了避免过多的噪声，使用自举来重置密文中的噪声水平，但它需要很大的密钥并且计算成本很高。环面全同态加密 (TFHE) 方案提供了更快的可编程引导 (PBS) 算法，这对于许多注重隐私的应用程序至关重要。然而，当前的TFHE方案不支持密文打包，导致吞吐量性能较低。据我们所知，这是第一个彻底分析 TFHE bootstrapping、识别 GPU 中的 TFHE 加速瓶颈并提出硬件 TFHE 加速器来解决瓶颈的工作。

我们首先确定 GPU 中由于盲旋转碎片问题而导致的 TFHE 加速瓶颈。这可以通过增加 PBS 中的批量大小来改善。我们提出了一种两级批处理方法来增强 PBS 中的批处理大小。为了有效地实施该解决方案，我们引入了 Strix，利用带有专用单元的流式和完全流水线架构来加速 TFHE 中的密文处理。具体来说，我们提出了一种用于 TFHE 分解的新颖微架构，适合高吞吐量处理流数据。我们还采用全流水线 FFT 微架构来解决内存访问瓶颈，并通过折叠方案提高其性能，实现 2 倍吞吐量提升和 1.7 倍面积减少。在使用 PBS 运行 TFHE 时，Strix 的吞吐量分别比 CPU 和 GPU 上最先进的实现高出 1、067 倍和 37 倍，超过最先进的 TFHE 加速器 MATCHA 7.4 倍。

items.title: TT-GNN: Efficient On-Chip Graph Neural Network Training via Embedding Reformation and Hardware Optimization.
items.abstract:
Training Graph Neural Networks on large graphs is challenging due to the need to store graph data and move them along the memory hierarchy. In this work, we tackle this by effectively compressing graph embedding matrix such that the model training can be fully enabled with on-chip compute and memory resources. Specifically, we leverage the graph homophily property and consider using Tensor-train to represent the graph embedding. This allows nodes with similar neighborhoods to partially share the feature representation.

While applying Tensor-train reduces the size of the graph embedding, it imposes several challenges to hardware design. On one hand, utilizing low-rank representation requires the features to be decompressed before being sent to GNN models, which introduces extra computation overhead. On the other hand, the decompressed features might still exceed on-chip memory capacity even with the minibatch setting, causing inefficient off-chip memory access. Thus, we propose the TT-GNN hardware accelerator with a specialized dataflow tailored for on-chip Tensor-train GNN learning. Based on the on-chip memory capacity and training configuration, TT-GNN adaptively breaks down a minibatch into smaller microbatches that can be fitted on-chip. The microbatch composition and scheduling order are designed to maximize data reuse and reduce redundant computations both across and within microbatches. To mitigate TT computation overhead, we further propose a unified algorithm to jointly handle TT decompression during forward propagation and TT gradient derivation during backward propagation. Evaluated on a series of benchmarks, the proposed software-hardware solution is able to outperform existing CPU-GPU training systems on both training performance (1.55 ∼ 4210 ×) and energy efficiency (2.83 ∼ 2254 ×). We believe TT-GNN introduces a new perspective to address large-scale GNN training and enables possibilities to train GNN models even under a significantly constrained resource budget.
items.abstract_zh:
Training Graph Neural Networks on large graphs is challenging due to the need to store graph data and move them along the memory hierarchy.在这项工作中，我们通过有效压缩图嵌入矩阵来解决这个问题，以便可以利用片上计算和内存资源完全启用模型训练。 Specifically, we leverage the graph homophily property and consider using Tensor-train to represent the graph embedding. This allows nodes with similar neighborhoods to partially share the feature representation.

While applying Tensor-train reduces the size of the graph embedding, it imposes several challenges to hardware design.一方面，利用低秩表示需要在发送到 GNN 模型之前对特征进行解压缩，这会带来额外的计算开销。另一方面，即使采用小批量设置，解压缩的功能仍然可能超出片上内存容量，导致片外内存访问效率低下。 Thus, we propose the TT-GNN hardware accelerator with a specialized dataflow tailored for on-chip Tensor-train GNN learning.根据片上内存容量和训练配置，TT-GNN 自适应地将小批量分解为可以安装在片上的更小的微批量。微批次组成和调度顺序旨在最大限度地提高数据重用并减少微批次之间和微批次内的冗余计算。为了减轻 TT 计算开销，我们进一步提出了一种统一的算法来联合处理前向传播期间的 TT 解压缩和后向传播期间的 TT 梯度推导。通过一系列基准评估，所提出的软硬件解决方案在训练性能（1.55∼4210×）和能源效率（2.83∼2254×）方面均优于现有的CPU-GPU训练系统。我们相信 TT-GNN 引入了解决大规模 GNN 训练的新视角，并且即使在资源预算严重受限的情况下也能够训练 GNN 模型。

items.title: NeuroLPM - Scaling Longest Prefix Match Hardware with Neural Networks.
items.abstract:
Longest Prefix Match engines (LPM) are broadly used in computer systems and especially in modern network devices such as Network Interface Cards (NICs), switches and routers. However, existing LPM hardware fails to scale to millions of rules required by modern systems, is often optimized for specific applications, and thus is performance-sensitive to the structure of LPM rules.

We describe NeuroLPM, a new architecture for multi-purpose LPM hardware that replaces queries in traditional memory-intensive trie- and hash-table data structures with inference in a lightweight Neural Network-based model, called RQRMI. NeuroLPM scales to millions of rules under small on-die SRAM budget and achieves stable, rule-structure-agnostic performance, allowing its use in a variety of applications. We solve several unique challenges when implementing RQRMI inference in hardware, including minimizing the amount of floating point computations while maintaining query correctness, and scaling the rule-set size while ensuring small, deterministic off-chip memory bandwidth.

We prototype NeuroLPM in Verilog and evaluate it on real-world packet forwarding rule-sets and network traces. NeuroLPM offers substantial scalability benefits without any application-specific optimizations. For example, it is the only algorithm that can serve a 950K-large rule-set at an average of 196M queries per second with 4.5MB of SRAM, only within 2% of the best-case throughput of the state-of-the-art Tree Bitmap and SAIL on smaller rule-sets. With 2MB of SRAM, it reduces the DRAM bandwidth per query, the dominant performance factor, by up to 9 × and 3 × compared to the state-of-the-art.
items.abstract_zh:
最长前缀匹配引擎 (LPM) 广泛用于计算机系统，尤其是现代网络设备，例如网络接口卡 (NIC)、交换机和路由器。然而，现有的 LPM 硬件无法扩展到现代系统所需的数百万条规则，并且通常针对特定应用进行优化，因此对 LPM 规则的结构性能敏感。

我们描述了 NeuroLPM，这是一种用于多用途 LPM 硬件的新架构，它用基于轻量级神经网络的模型（称为 RQRMI）中的推理来替换传统内存密集型 trie 和哈希表数据结构中的查询。 NeuroLPM 可在较小的片上 SRAM 预算下扩展到数百万条规则，并实现稳定、与规则结构无关的性能，从而允许其在各种应用中使用。我们在硬件中实现 RQRMI 推理时解决了几个独特的挑战，包括在保持查询正确性的同时最大限度地减少浮点计算量，以及在确保较小的确定性片外内存带宽的同时扩展规则集大小。

我们在 Verilog 中构建 NeuroLPM 原型，并根据现实世界的数据包转发规则集和网络跟踪对其进行评估。 NeuroLPM 提供了巨大的可扩展性优势，无需任何特定于应用程序的优化。例如，它是唯一能够使用 4.5MB SRAM 以平均每秒 196M 查询的速度为 950K 大型规则集提供服务的算法，仅比最先进的 Tree Bitmap 和 SAIL 在较小规则集上的最佳情况吞吐量低 2%。凭借 2MB 的 SRAM，与最先进的技术相比，它可以将每个查询的 DRAM 带宽（主要性能因素）降低多达 9 倍和 3 倍。

items.title: UNICO: Unified Hardware Software Co-Optimization for Robust Neural Network Acceleration.
items.abstract: Specialized hardware has become an indispensable component to deep neural network (DNN) acceleration. To keep up with the rapid evolution of neural networks, holistic and automated solutions for jointly optimizing both hardware (HW) architectures and software (SW) mapping have been studied. These studies face two major challenges. First, the combined HW-SW design space is vast, which hinders the finding of optimal or near-optimal designs. This issue is exacerbated for industrial cases when cycle accurate models are used for design evaluation in the joint optimization.
